zh.lifeSummary: Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby是Robert de Marmion, Lord of Scrivesby and Tamworth和Hawise的兒子，於大約1100年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯豐特納勒-馬米。他和Melisende de Rethel至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1181年9月8日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marimon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby was born about 1100, in Fontenay-le-Marmion, Calvados, Normandy, France as the son of Robert de Marmion, Lord of Scrivesby and Tamworth and Hawise. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Melisende de Rethel. He died on 8 September 1181, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Melisende de Rethel. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1181, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsbyは約1100年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスフォンテナイ-レ-マルミオンでRobert de Marmion, Lord of Scrivesby and TamworthとHawiseの息子として生まれた。彼はMelisende de Rethelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1181年9月8日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby(은)는 대략 1100년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 폰텐아이-레-마미언에서 Robert de Marmion, Lord of Scrivesby and Tamworth(와)과 Hawise의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Melisende de Rethel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de Marimon Lord Scrivelsby родился около 1100 г. в местности фонтенеи-ле-мармион, калвадос, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Robert de Marmion, Lord of Scrivesby and Tamworth и Hawise. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Melisende de Rethel. Он умер 8 сентября 1181 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
